narrative.challenge: Experience Navigator is an AI-powered strategy generation tool built for mid-to-senior CX and EX leaders who are accountable for business outcomes but lack the time and specialist depth to build cross-functional programmes from scratch.
narrative.solution: The core problem was what I framed as the Strategic Execution Gap — organisations routinely set high-level goals like "reduce churn" or "improve onboarding" but have no systematic way to convert those intentions into operational plans, survey logic, and measurable KPIs. I led UX across a 3-person team (1 designer, 1 PM, 1 developer) over a 3-month sprint, designing the end-to-end experience from goal input to a fully generated, section-by-section strategy output.

title: Eliminating the Strategic Execution
description: Designing an AI-powered experience strategy builder that converts a business goal into a fully operational CX/EX programme in 2 minutes.
ndaNote: Specific client names and internal metrics anonymised at the company's request. Full context available under mutual NDA.
